message:
feat(fsqlite-types): obligation lifecycle + TrackedSender + EvictChannel (bd-3j1j)

§4.13 Obligations: two-phase lifecycle (Reserved → Committed/Aborted),
5 FrankenSQLite obligation types (SendPermit, CommitResponse, TxnSlot,
WitnessReservation, SharedStateRegistration), ObligationLedger for
diagnostic dumps, TrackedSender for obligation-tracked channels,
EvictChannel for non-critical telemetry. Lab mode panics on leak,
production mode records diagnostics. 10 unit tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
